queries.question: Which diplomas require a passing exam for completion and which certificates have the same requirement?
queries.sql:
SELECT Diplomas.title
FROM Diplomas
WHERE Diplomas.CompletionRequirements = "Passing Exam"
UNION
SELECT Certificates.title
FROM Certificates
WHERE Certificates.CompletionRequirements = "Passing Exam"

queries.question: Provide a list of all diplomas and also provide a list of certificates that require a passing exam for completion.
queries.sql:
SELECT Diplomas.title
FROM Diplomas
UNION
SELECT Certificates.title
FROM Certificates
WHERE Certificates.CompletionRequirements = "Passing Exam"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show diplomas and certificates that require a passing exam for completion.
